headline: Private credit is bruised, not broken
summary: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon’s “cockroach” warnings may have primed investors for last month’s SaaS-pocalypse, but private credit is far from extermination. Amid industrywide fundraising woes, LPs committed a cumulative $234.1 billion across 200 private debt funds last year, the second-most capital raised of any asset class after private equity, PitchBook’s 2025 Global Private Market Fundraising Report shows. headline: Consumer Internet Stocks Q4 In Review: Electronic Arts (NASDAQ:EA) Vs Peers
summary: As the craze of earnings season draws to a close, here’s a look back at some of the most exciting (and some less so) results from Q4. Today, we are looking at consumer internet stocks, starting with Electronic Arts (NASDAQ:EA).

headline: JPMorgan launches $8 billion bond sale for EA buyout
summary: JPMorgan Chase kicked off an $8 billion junk bond sale on March 23 to finance the $55 billion leveraged buyout of Electronic Arts. It is the largest leveraged buyout in history. The offering launched as credit markets remain volatile and investor appetite for risky debt swings sharply from week to ...
